_comment: Python port egg for Takeshi Bot. Requires a Docker image with Python 3.12+, Node.js 24+ and FFmpeg.
name: Takeshi Bot Python Port
author: python-port
description: Runs Takeshi Bot's Python port while keeping Baileys in a Node.js sidecar.
startup: python3 -m pip install --break-system-packages -r requirements.txt && npm install && python3 -m takeshi_bot

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

apt update
apt install -y git curl unzip make gcc g++ ffmpeg python3 python3-pip python3-venv

cd /mnt/server
if [ -d .git ]; then
  git pull
else
  git clone https://github.com/guiireal/takeshi-bot.git .
fi

npm install
python3 -m pip install --break-system-packages -r requirements.txt

echo "Takeshi Bot Python Port installed."
